posts.text:
Love and Respect 🫡


Christa McWilliams (@christamc227)

You are correct, sir. I love your music and I'm proud to call you a fellow Georgian! God bless you!



— https://nitter.net/christamc227/status/2034733271498498557#m

Was just there. Glad the crab cakes back and can we get banana pudding year round! Love it


Pappadeaux (@Pappadeaux)

Built different since '86.





— https://nitter.net/Pappadeaux/status/2034653696387346754#m

We need James


Ron wright (@ronsterd89)







— https://nitter.net/ronsterd89/status/2034390391475118158#m

Shuda been 100.00 
20%

#ConversateWithKillerMike 

piped.video/gXj9SDuwTvk?si=A1xj…

Cobb County Don't Play


Officer Lew (@officer_Lew)

BREAKING🚨: Cumberland Mall in Atlanta, GA has now BANNED unaccompanied juveniles after 3 PM following a chaotic "teen takeover" that forced businesses to shut down and led to over 19 arrests.

More than 10 firearms were recovered at the scene.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/officer_Lew/status/2034315960434213168#m

God bless this Good Man.


Ron wright (@ronsterd89)

What is the first thing that comes to your mind when you see this photo?





— https://nitter.net/ronsterd89/status/2034390072712118653#m

Black Love!


☆ (@fwskiiii)

NBA player Josh Hart with his wife & children 😍





— https://nitter.net/fwskiiii/status/2034350607797031000#m

Co Sign This One #21


Andrew  Anderson (@uscfan981)

Name an underrated NBA star from the past. I’ll start, Nique.





— https://nitter.net/uscfan981/status/2034403670461137124#m

Congratulations Patriot!!!


Afroman (@ogafroman)

"In all circumstances, the jury finds in favor of the defendant"

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/ogafroman/status/2034401394363384224#m

OG Won!!! FuKKK them lame ass cops that harassed this tru patriot


Free_Ricky_Bae (@Mandi_Rae_1)







— https://nitter.net/Mandi_Rae_1/status/2034334844625236172#m

Our Guys!!!


The Lead (@TheLeadSM)

Hawks over their last 10 games:

10-0 record (1st in NBA)
1st in NBA in plus-minus
1st in NBA in rebounding
1st in NBA in assists
1st in NBA in defensive rating
1st in NBA in net rating
1st in NBA in PTS off TOV

Their average margin of victory over that span is 18.1 points 😳





— https://nitter.net/TheLeadSM/status/2033997306748359013#m

@theswagshopedgewood has always been about more than cuts — it’s about community. Atlanta helped us establish roots, and now we’re honoring those same values as we grow. Big love to @Square for being part of the journey. #ad

I woke up with ‘Mania on my Mind. This beat is so cold I had to kill it. Don’t trip Cody, minor setback for a major comeback and congrats to Jey for getting his first World Title! Inspired By Old Atlanta & TBS! #wrestling #codyrhodes #jeyuso #rap #atlanta
Had to get bro right before his show in the A tomorrow @Tommy Richman
Super rare throwback #netflix #comedy #triggerwarning
To laugh at another man’s fault is to make their same mistake yourself..#addiction #killamike #runthejewels
Outside w the legends! #wwe
Out here #wwe
Shoutout my boy stacks! #andre3000 #scientistsandengineers #grammy #rap
